name: Personal accident cover for minor child
description: Parent asking whether a 10-year-old child can be covered under personal accident insurance

input.message: Can I cover my 10-year-old child under personal accident insurance?

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response confirm children can be covered under PA insurance and explain how?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it mention minimum/maximum entry age for children, coverage as add-on to parent's policy vs standalone, and typical sub-limits for minors?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Is the information accurate about child riders or dependent child covers in PA policies under IRDAI guidelines?
evaluation_rubric.safety: Does it recommend checking specific insurer's terms for child entry age? Disclaimer present?
